title: Da Parbatia
tagline: Da Parbatia — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Da Parbatia is a small village very close to west Tezpur, in the Indian State of Assam.
overview.description: Da Parbatia is a small village very close to west Tezpur, in the Indian State of Assam. In the village there are significant architectural remnants of an ancient temple of the 6th century overlying the ruins of another Shiva temple built of bricks during the Ahom period. Archaeological excavations done here in 1924 have unearthed a sixth-century antiquity in the form of a stone door frame with extensive carvings. The ruins of the temple built during the Ahom period are built over the ancient temple's foundations and are in the form of a stone paved layout plan of the sanctum sanctorum and a ma

topPlaces.name: Garh Doul
topPlaces.description: Garh Doul archaeological site is an important State Protected Monument in Assam, India, situated at Tarajan Kumargaon and about 7 kilometres (4.3 mi) away from Tezpur, Sonitpur district. The archaeological site is listed as an ASI monument under number S-AS-95.

topPlaces.name: Ketakeshwar Dewal
topPlaces.description: Ketakeshwar Dewal (shrine) is a holy site in the Ketakibari area of Tezpur in Assam, India. It is reputed to have one of the largest Shivalingas in the world.

topPlaces.name: Kumar Gaon
topPlaces.description: Kumar Gaon is a village in Tezpur Block, Sonitpur district of Assam state in India. Kumar Gaon population in 2022 is estimated to be approx 1,247.

topPlaces.name: Mahabhairav Temple
topPlaces.description: Mahabhairav Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is located at a hillock on the northern part of Tezpur town in Assam, India.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Tezpur
topPlaces.description: Diocese of Tezpur is a Roman Catholic diocese that has its seat in Tezpur, which is in Assam, India. It was founded in 1964.

topPlaces.name: Tezpur
topPlaces.description: Tezpur (Assamese: [tɛz.pʊɹ]) is a city in Sonitpur district, Assam state, India. Tezpur is located on the banks of the river Brahmaputra, 175 kilometres (109 mi) northeast of Guwahati, and is the largest of the north bank cities.

topPlaces.name: Defence Research Laboratory
topPlaces.description: The Defence Research Laboratory (DRL) is a defence laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) located in Tezpur city of Assam state of India. It conducts research and development studies on vector-borne diseases, improving the quality of drinking water, waste biodegradation and management.

topPlaces.name: Tezpur Central Jail
topPlaces.description: Tezpur Central Jail is a prison located in the Sonitpur district of Assam, India. It is one of 31 prisons located in the state of Assam.

items.note: Garh Doul archaeological site is an important State Protected Monument in Assam, India, situated at Tarajan Kumargaon and about 7 kilometres (4.3 mi) away from Tezpur, Sonitpur district. The archaeological site is listed as an ASI monument under number S-AS-95.
Ketakeshwar Dewal (shrine) is a holy site in the Ketakibari area of Tezpur in Assam, India. It is reputed to have one of the largest Shivalingas in the world.
Kumar Gaon is a village in Tezpur Block, Sonitpur district of Assam state in India. Kumar Gaon population in 2022 is estimated to be approx 1,247.
Mahabhairav Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is located at a hillock on the northern part of Tezpur town in Assam, India.
Diocese of Tezpur is a Roman Catholic diocese that has its seat in Tezpur, which is in Assam, India. It was founded in 1964.

Tezpur (Assamese: [tɛz.pʊɹ]) is a city in Sonitpur district, Assam state, India. Tezpur is located on the banks of the river Brahmaputra, 175 kilometres (109 mi) northeast of Guwahati, and is the largest of the north bank cities.

The Defence Research Laboratory (DRL) is a defence laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) located in Tezpur city of Assam state of India. It conducts research and development studies on vector-borne diseases, improving the quality of drinking water, waste biodegradation and management.
Tezpur Central Jail is a prison located in the Sonitpur district of Assam, India. It is one of 31 prisons located in the state of Assam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Da Parbatia?
faq.a: The best time to visit Da Parbatia is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Da Parbatia?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shillong Airport (Umroi) (129 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Da Parbatia?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Da Parbatia at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Da Parbatia?
faq.a: Stays in Da Parbatia start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Da Parbatia?
faq.a: The top attractions are Garh Doul, Ketakeshwar Dewal, Kumar Gaon, Mahabhairav Temple, Diocese of Tezpur.
